title: User Login Success
description: Verify that a user can log in successfully with valid credentials and appropriate role.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter valid username and password for an admin user
Click login button
Verify that login is successful and user is redirected to the correct dashboard

title: User Login Failure with Invalid Credentials
description: Verify that login fails when incorrect username or password is provided.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter invalid username and/or password
Click login button
Verify that login fails and appropriate error message is displayed

title: User Registration Success
description: Verify that new user registration completes successfully with valid data.

steps.description: Navigate to registration page
Fill out registration form with valid information
Submit registration form
Confirm registration success message and email verification triggered

title: Password Reset Flow
description: Verify password reset process is working correctly via email link.

steps.description: Navigate to login page and click 'Forgot Password'
Submit registered email for password reset
Verify password reset email is sent to user
Open email and follow password reset link
Enter new password and confirm
Verify password reset success and user can log in with new password

title: Access Control for Protected Pages
description: Verify that users without authentication cannot access protected pages and are redirected to login.

steps.description: Attempt to access admin dashboard URL without being logged in
Verify redirect to login page
Attempt to access drugs management pages without authentication
Verify redirect to login page

title: Admin Dashboard Data Display with Filters
description: Verify that sales statistics, risky zones, top performers, and invoices display correctly with month and year filtering.

steps.description: Log in as admin user
Navigate to admin dashboard
Verify sales statistics, risky zones, top performers, latest and overdue invoices are displayed
Apply month filter and verify data updates accordingly
Apply year filter and verify data updates accordingly
Navigate to a line-specific dashboard (line 1 or 2)
Verify dashboard shows data filtered by selected line

title: Drugs Management CRUD Operations
description: Verify creating, reading, updating, and deleting drugs including validation of mandatory fields.

steps.description: Log in as admin user
Create a new drug with valid name, price, and line
Verify drug is successfully created and listed
Fetch drug details by ID
Verify response contains correct drug data and sales history
Update the drug with new price and name
Verify drug data is updated successfully
Delete the drug
Verify drug is removed from the list and database
Attempt creating a drug with missing mandatory fields
Verify appropriate validation error messages are shown

title: Invoices Management Full Workflow
description: Verify creating, updating, deleting invoices, filtering, PDF generation, CSV export, and warehouse stock deduction.

steps.description: Log in as admin user
Create a new invoice with valid data including drugs, quantities, and linked doctor
Verify invoice is saved and warehouse stock is correctly deducted
Retrieve invoice by ID and verify details
Update invoice data (e.g., change quantities or drugs)
Verify invoice is updated and stock changes are reflected correctly
Delete an invoice
Verify invoice is deleted and warehouse stock is restored
Apply invoice filtering by date range, doctor, and status
Verify filtered invoices are displayed correctly
Generate PDF for an invoice
Verify PDF is generated with correct invoice details
Export invoices CSV
Verify CSV export contains expected invoices data

title: Provinces Management CRUD
description: Verify create, read, update, delete operations for provinces with validation.

steps.description: Create a new province with valid name
Confirm new province is added
View a province by ID
Verify province data matches expected
Update province name
Verify update is successful
Delete a province
Verify province removal from list

title: Profile Update and Password Change
description: Verify user can update profile details and successfully change password.

steps.description: Log in as any authenticated user
Navigate to profile page
Update profile details such as name or email
Verify profile updates are saved successfully
Attempt to change password with correct current password and new password
Verify password is changed successfully and user can log in with new password
Attempt to change password with incorrect current password
Verify error message is displayed and password is not changed

title: Warehouse Stock Addition and Return
description: Verify stock addition and stock return operations in warehouses update drug inventory correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to a specific warehouse stock add page
Add stock for a drug with valid quantity
Verify stock level for drug in warehouse is increased accordingly
Navigate to the warehouse stock return page
Return stock for a drug with valid quantity
Verify stock level for drug is decreased accordingly but not below zero
Attempt to return stock quantity greater than available
Verify error is shown and operation is prevented

title: Zone Management and Expense Tracking
description: Verify CRUD for zones and management of zone expenses with correct date and amount tracking.

steps.description: Create a new zone with valid attributes and line assignment
Confirm zone appears in list and has correct line info
Add expenses to a zone with date and amount
Verify expense records are created and retrievable
Delete a zone expense
Verify expense record is removed successfully

title: Doctor Deals CRUD and Payment
description: Verify creating, viewing, updating, deleting doctor deals and processing payments correctly.

steps.description: Create doctor deal with targets, commission percentage, linked pharmacists and drugs
Verify deal is saved and accurately linked
View existing doctor deal by ID
Verify all deal details are accurate
Update the deal with new target amounts or commission rate
Verify updates persist correctly
Process a payment for the doctor deal
Verify payment is recorded and balances updated
Delete a doctor deal
Confirm deal is removed and no residual data remains

title: Reports Generation and Data Accuracy - Pharmacies
description: Verify reports for pharmacies generate correctly filtered sales statistics by province, center, and pharmacist.

steps.description: Navigate to reports section
Generate report filtered by province
Verify report displays correct sales stats for selected province
Generate report filtered by center
Verify report displays correct sales stats for selected center
Generate report filtered by pharmacist
Verify report displays correct sales stats for selected pharmacist

title: Reports Generation and Data Accuracy - Representatives
description: Verify sales and medical representatives reports show correct performance and sales statistics.

steps.description: Navigate to representatives report page
Generate main representatives performance report
Verify data for all representatives is accurate
Generate detailed report for a specific representative
Verify report content matches representative performance data

title: Reports Generation and Payment - Doctors
description: Verify reports for doctors include sales, commissions, balances and support payment transaction.

steps.description: Generate doctors report overall and filtered by province and center
Verify all sales and commissions data are accurate
View detailed report for a specific doctor
Verify detailed balances and commission calculations
Process payment for a doctor's commission
Verify payment updates doctor balance correctly
Generate doctors balance report
Verify report accurately reflects outstanding balances

title: Zone Risk Report and Export
description: Verify zone risk report shows zones with high risk ratios and exports data correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to zone risk report page
Verify report lists zones with discount and expense risk ratios
View detailed report for a specific zone
Verify detailed risk information is correct
Export zone risk report
Verify export file contains complete and accurate data

title: Edge Case: Invalid Data Submission to CRUD APIs
description: Verify system handles invalid or malformed data for all CRUD endpoints gracefully with proper validation errors.

steps.description: Attempt to create resources (drug, province, center, doctor, etc.) with missing required fields
Verify validation errors are returned indicating missing required fields
Attempt to update resources with invalid data e.g. negative price or invalid email
Verify validation errors and no database changes are made
Attempt to access or delete resources using invalid or non-existent IDs
Verify 404 or appropriate error responses are received
